title: stelis parvilabris
intro: Stelis parvilabris is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting wound healing. Stelis parvilabris can be prepared into herbal remedies like infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
